proof:
rcases h₀ with ⟨hx, hy, hz⟩
  let a := x / (x - 1)
  let b := y / (y - 1)
  let c := z / (z - 1)
  have ha : x - 1 ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.mpr hx
  have hb : y - 1 ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.mpr hy
  have hc : z - 1 ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.mpr hz
  have h_rel : a * b * c = (a - 1) * (b - 1) * (c - 1) := by
    field_simp [a, b, c, ha, hb, hc]
    exact h₁
  have h_sum : a * b + b * c + c * a = a + b + c - 1 := by
    ring_nf at h_rel
    linarith
  have h_goal : x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 := by
    simp only [a, b, c, div_pow]
  have h_sq_sum : a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 = (a + b + c - 1) ^ 2 + 1 := by
    have : a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 = (a + b + c) ^ 2 - 2 * (a * b + b * c + c * a) := by ring
    rw [this, h_sum]
    ring
  rw [h_goal, h_sq_sum]
  nlinarith
successful_attempts:
rcases h₀ with ⟨hx, hy, hz⟩
  let a := x / (x - 1)
  let b := y / (y - 1)
  let c := z / (z - 1)
  have ha : x - 1 ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.mpr hx
  have hb : y - 1 ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.mpr hy
  have hc : z - 1 ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.mpr hz
  have h_rel : a * b * c = (a - 1) * (b - 1) * (c - 1) := by
    field_simp [a, b, c, ha, hb, hc]
    exact h₁
  have h_sum : a * b + b * c + c * a = a + b + c - 1 := by
    ring_nf at h_rel
    linarith
  have h_goal : x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 := by
    simp only [a, b, c, div_pow]
  have h_sq_sum : a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 = (a + b + c - 1) ^ 2 + 1 := by
    have : a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 = (a + b + c) ^ 2 - 2 * (a * b + b * c + c * a) := by ring
    rw [this, h_sum]
    ring
  rw [h_goal, h_sq_sum]
  nlinarith
